details.note: PhaseGate service — holds current lifecycle phase's allowedTools in a Ref. Provides enterPhase/exitPhase/checkAllowed methods for runtime tool gating.
Wired PhaseGate into lifecycle phase transitions — calls enterPhase on each phase entry, exitPhase via Effect.ensuring on lifecycle completion
Added PhaseGate check before built-in tool execution — rejects disallowed tools with a clear ToolError. Uses Effect.serviceOption for graceful fallback when PhaseGate is not available.
